pressActionToContinue: Press the action button to continue.
menuContext: Menu. {{up}} or {{down}} to browse, {{action}} to select, {{cancel}} to close.
menuContextNoKey: Menu. Up or Down to browse, action button to select, cancel button to close.
titleScreenContext: PokéRogue Title Screen. {{up}}, {{down}}, {{left}}, or {{right}} to navigate, {{action}} to select.
titleScreenContextNoKey: PokéRogue Title Screen. Use arrow keys to navigate, action button to select.
settingsContext: {{title}}. {{up}} or {{down}} to browse settings, {{left}} or {{right}} to change values. {{prevTab}} and {{nextTab}} to switch tabs. {{cancel}} to go back.
settingsContextNoKey: {{title}}. Up or Down to browse settings, Left or Right to change values. Use the previous tab and next tab buttons to switch tabs. Cancel to go back.
tabSwitched: Tab: {{label}}. {{prevTab}} for previous tab, {{nextTab}} for next tab.
starterFilterShortcuts: Press {{cycleTera}} to filter, {{cycleForm}} to change form, {{cycleShiny}} for shiny, {{cycleAbility}} for ability, {{cycleNature}} for nature.
starterFilterShortcutsNoKey: Use the filter and cycle buttons to change view.
loginFormIntro: {{title}} form. Enter username and password, then press the Submit key or Tab to the Login button.
registerFormIntro: {{title}} form. Enter username, password, and confirm password. Press the Submit key or Tab to the Register button.
loginOrRegisterIntro: PokéRogue. {{login}} or {{register}}. Tab to switch, Enter to select.
commandContext: What will {{pokemonName}} do? {{up}}, {{down}}, {{left}}, or {{right}} to choose, {{action}} to select, {{cancel}} to cancel.
commandContextNoKey: What will {{pokemonName}} do? Arrow keys to choose, action button to select, cancel button to cancel.
fightContext: Choose a move. {{up}}, {{down}}, {{left}}, or {{right}} to select, {{action}} to confirm, {{cancel}} to go back.
fightContextNoKey: Choose a move. Arrow keys to select, action button to confirm, cancel button to go back.
modifierSelectContext: Choose an item reward. {{up}}, {{down}}, {{left}}, or {{right}} to browse, {{action}} to select, {{cancel}} to skip.
modifierSelectContextNoKey: Choose an item reward. Arrow keys to browse, action button to select, cancel button to skip.
partyContext: Party. {{up}} or {{down}} to select Pokémon, {{action}} to choose, {{cancel}} to cancel.
partyContextNoKey: Party. Up or Down to select Pokémon, action button to choose, cancel button to cancel.
saveSlotContext: {{label}} Game. {{up}} or {{down}} to browse save slots, {{action}} to select, {{cancel}} to cancel.
saveSlotContextNoKey: {{label}} Game. Up or Down to browse save slots, action button to select, cancel button to cancel.
filterOptionsOpened: {{label}} options opened.{{currentOption}} {{up}} or {{down}} to browse, {{action}} to toggle, {{cancel}} to close.
filterOptionsOpenedNoKey: {{label}} options opened.{{currentOption}} Up or Down to browse, action button to toggle, cancel button to close.
bindingCaptureCollision: Key captured. That key is already bound — {{left}} or {{right}} to choose swap or cancel, {{action}} to confirm.
bindingCaptureCollisionNoKey: Key captured. That key is already bound — Left or Right to choose swap or cancel, action button to confirm.
bindingCapture: Key captured. {{left}} or {{right}} to choose confirm or cancel, {{action}} to confirm.
bindingCaptureNoKey: Key captured. Left or Right to choose confirm or cancel, action button to confirm.
bindingPressPrompt: {{prompt}} — five seconds to bind, or press {{cancel}} to cancel.
bindingPressPromptNoKey: {{prompt}} — five seconds to bind, or press the cancel button to cancel.
summaryContext: {{title}}. {{left}} or {{right}} to switch pages, {{cancel}} to close.
summaryContextNoKey: {{title}}. Left or Right to switch pages, cancel button to close.
challengesContext: {{title}}. {{up}} or {{down}} to pick a challenge, {{left}} or {{right}} to change its value, {{action}} to confirm, {{cancel}} to go back.
challengesContextNoKey: {{title}}. Up or Down to pick a challenge, Left or Right to change its value, action button to confirm, cancel button to go back.
controlSettingsContext: {{title}} bindings. {{up}} or {{down}} to browse, {{left}} or {{right}} to change non-binding values, {{action}} to rebind the highlighted button, {{prevTab}} or {{nextTab}} to switch tabs, {{cancel}} to go back.
controlSettingsContextNoKey: {{title}} bindings. Up or Down to browse, Left or Right to change non-binding values, action button to rebind the highlighted button, cancel button to go back.
pokedexPageContext: {{name}} pokédex entry. {{type}} type. {{caught}}. {{up}} or {{down}} to browse sections, {{action}} to open the highlighted section, {{cancel}} to go back.
pokedexPageContextNoKey: {{name}} pokédex entry. {{type}} type. {{caught}}. Up or Down to browse sections, action button to open, cancel button to go back.

starterSelectContextNoKey: Starter Selection. Arrow keys to browse Pokémon, action button to add to team, cancel button to go back.

starterFilterBarContextNoKey: Filter bar. Left or Right to switch filters, action button to open, Up or Down to move between filters and Pokémon list.
partySlotInfo: Party slot {{current}} of {{total}}: {{name}}. {{cancel}} to remove from team.
